Class JasperCsvExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.JasperCsvExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperICsvExporter, JasperIExporter, Serializable
public class JasperCsvExporter extends AbstractJasperExporter implements JasperICsvExporter

JasperCsvExporter class.
